title: A Sovereign, Open-Source Foundation Model for German and English
innovation_summary: A Sovereign, Open-Source Foundation Model for German and English: We present Soofi S 30B-A3B, a sovereign, open-source Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) hybrid Mamba Transformer foundation model for German and English.
